cluster_articles.title: Microsoft announces a sweeping overhaul of its Azure AI lineup, consolidating Foundry, Studio, and Copilot platforms into a unified control plane for enterprise customers
cluster_articles.summary: The consolidation aims to reduce SKU proliferation and simplify onboarding for large accounts.

cluster_articles.title: Microsoft's Azure AI gets a long-awaited unification, merging Foundry with Studio under one roof in a move that clearly targets AWS Bedrock and Google Vertex AI
cluster_articles.summary: Analysts view the merger as a response to competitive pressure from AWS and Google Cloud.
